samples.xml_description:
<module id="asyn_fifo">
    <description>An asynchronous FIFO with configurable depth and width.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="wclk">Write clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rclk">Read clock signal.</input>
        <input id="wenc">Write enable signal.</input>
        <input id="waddr" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">Write address.</input>
        <input id="wdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Write data.</input>
        <input id="wreset_n">Write reset signal.</input>
        <input id="renc">Read enable signal.</input>
        <input id="raddr" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">Read address.</input>
        <input id="rreset_n">Read reset signal.</input>
        <output id="rdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Read data.</output>
        <input id="winc">Write increment signal.</input>
        <input id="rinc">Read increment signal.</input>
        <output id="wfull">Write full signal.</output>
        <output id="rempty">Read empty signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant name="DEPTH">FIFO depth configuration parameter.</constant>
        <constant name="WIDTH">FIFO width configuration parameter.</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign id="wfull">((wptr == {~rptr_syn[3], rptr_syn[2:0]})) ? 1 : 0;</assign>
        <assign id="rempty">(rptr_syn == wptr) ? 1 : 0;
        <assign id="wen">wenc & winc;</assign>
        <assign id="ren">renc & rinc;</assign>
        <assign id="wdata_out">RAM.wdata_in(wclk, wenc, waddr, wdata, rclk, renc, raddr, rdata);</assign>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        Dual-port RAM instantiation:
        <instance id="RAM">
            <module_ref> dual_port_RAM </module_ref>
            <port_list>
                <port refid="wclk"/>
                <port refid="wenc"/>
                <port refid="waddr"/>
                <port refid="wdata"/>
                <port refid="rclk"/>
                <port refid="renc"/>
                <port refid="raddr"/>
                <port refid="rdata"/>
            </port_list>
        </instance>
        Write Pointer Logic:
        <reg id="waddr_bin" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">
            <initial_value>0</initial_value>
            <always @("posedge wclk or negedge wrstn") begin
                if (!wrstn)
                    waddr_bin <= 0;
                else if (winc)
                    waddr_bin <= waddr_bin + 1;
            end
        </reg>
        <wire id="waddr_gray" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">
            <assign>((waddr_bin >> 0) ^ waddr_bin);
        </wire>
        <reg id="wptr" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">
            <initial_value>0</initial_value>
            <always @("posedge wclk or negedge wrstn") begin
                if (!wrstn)
                    wptr <= 0;
                else
                    wptr <= waddr_gray;
            end
        </reg>
        <reg id="wptr_buff" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">
            <initial_value>0</initial_value>
            <always @("posedge wclk or negedge wrstn") begin
                if (!wrstn)
                    wptr_buff <= 0;
                else
                    wptr_buff <= wptr;
            end
        </reg>
        Read Pointer Logic:
        <reg id="raddr_bin" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">
            <initial_value>0</initial_value>
            <always @("posedge rclk or negedge rreset_n") begin
                if (!rreset_n)
                    raddr_bin <= 0;
                else if (rinc)
                    raddr_bin <= raddr_bin + 1;
            end
        </reg>
        <wire id="raddr_gray" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">
            <assign>((raddr_bin >> 0) ^ raddr_bin);
        </wire>
        <reg id="rptr" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">
            <initial_value>0</initial_value>
            <always @("posedge rclk or negedge rreset_n") begin
                if (!rreset_n)
                    rptr <= 0;
                else
                    rptr <= raddr_gray;
            end
        </reg>
        <reg id="rptr_buff" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">
            <initial_value>0</initial_value>
            <always @("posedge rclk or negedge rreset_n") begin
                if (!rreset_n)
                    rptr_buff <= 0;
                else
                    rptr_buff <= rptr;
            end
        </reg>
        Read Pointer Synchronizer Logic:
        <reg id="rptr_syn" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">
            <initial_value>0</initial_value>
            <always @("posedge wclk or negedge wrstn") begin
                if (!wrstn)
                    rptr_syn <= 0;
                else
                    rptr_syn <= rptr_buff;
            end
        </reg>
        Write Pointer Synchronizer Logic:
        <reg id="wptr_syn" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">
            <initial_value>0</initial_value>
            <always @("posedge rclk or negedge rreset_n") begin
                if (!rreset_n)
                    wptr_syn <= 0;
                else
                    wptr_syn <= wptr_buff;
            end
        </reg>
    </implementation>
</module>
